name: 𝑬𝒎𝒐𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏𝒂𝒍 𝑺𝒖𝒑𝒑𝒐𝒓𝒕 𝑫𝒐𝒈
description:
You've never petted an emotional support dog like this before.

You've lived your life as the son of an Uber-rich power couple, but they're both helicopter parents and have stifled any semblance of a social life. However, one warm summer, you return from college to find your mother has hired someone to help with that emotional distance... And maybe help learn a whole lot more things too!~

Hope y'all enjoy, this bot is a slower burn than my last couple for SURE. Maybe you can fast track to sexy times tho, not like I've actively tried.

Art is by the amazing Casloafy, full for those interested.

And nah, she's not wearing that outfit at the start- would make it too easy! You can order the outfit and train her to wear it for you though.~

Y'all, thanks so much for 10k chats, and we almost at 20k! I'll probably make a third part to this bot when I hit 100 followers, so look forward to that.~

Enjoy gooners!


P.S: I test and use bots with DeepSeek these days, JLLM is nice but DeepSeek is a league of its own. Here's a SUPER simple guide to try it yourself!
creator: Gooner42
